concerns.text: FR-013 states validation is skipped if KnotInfo reference coverage is <50%. SC-010 states validation is skipped if KnotInfo reference coverage is <90%. These are directly contradictory thresholds for the same validation skip condition.

Constitution Principle VII requires 'All statistical claims MUST include explicit significance thresholds (p-values, confidence intervals)'. FR-006 states 'p-values are NOT reported for census data'. These are directly contradictory requirements on the same artifact.
FR-003 contains incomplete citation: 'bridge number via Schubert's bridge decomposition (-bridge knot, source:).' Missing source reference creates documentation gap.
SC-001 references 'https://oeis.org/[sequence identifier]' with placeholder bracketed text instead of concrete OEIS sequence number. Cross-reference does not resolve to actual source.
FR-005 cites 'Birman & Menasco, foundational work; Ohyama, prior work' without full bibliographic details or page/section references, creating unresolvable cross-reference for reproducibility.
